entry.title: I am unable to figure out the odata response body when the message got failed in SAP CPI.
entry.content: we have changed iflow and added sequential multicast at the start of the iflow. When message got failed sequential multicast executed before the exception subprocess and we will get the data from sequential multicast not from the odata response. How to capture this.

Perfect, I can modify to suit the levels we have.
Thanks a lot @Johan_Hakkesteegt

when i try to connect to a system to get the odata services getting the below error.

 

When i check the same destination using my id in BTP the connection is successufl.

entry.content:
Hi,

You can write Scenario: Absence Validation business rule and can assign to reliable TİME TYPE in manage data.

entry.title: Invoices created via SD module does not show up in GSTR1 report
entry.content:
Product: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud (2408)
Export sale invoices created in the SD flow are not reflected in the GSTR1 report.  Impacted area is GST filing.

For example:

  1. Create an export sale order in SD.
  2. Process the sales order through delivery and billing.
  3. Generate the GSTR1 report.
  4. GSTR1 report does not have sales order invoices

Is this a product bug or a configuration issue?  Please advise.  Thanks.

entry.title: Trying to add email ID in EWA report
entry.content:
Dear PERSON_NAME,
Trying to add Email ID in PERSON_NAME report but facing issue.
Thanks & Regards
Tushil
Cell:+PHONE_NUMBER

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Cloud Application Services Reporting Dashboard


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Trying to add email ID in EWA report
entry.content: Please refer to KBA 2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 How to Setup / Configure EWA Reports or Add Email Recipients

entry.title: sales order pricing
entry.content:
Hi,

During sales order creation, MRP is picking, though i have made MRP- condition record- end to the previous date for a batch specific particular product .

entry.title: Re: SAP SMTP service with Office365 online exchange
entry.content: Hi Shetty, Have you completed the configurations? we are in the same phase could you share the details? . Regards SS

entry.title: Re: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:
Hi

it seems to me that you have a high traffic in your database.

While processing something, for SAP it is necessary to lock different tables to perform the requested job. Like item movement or document numbering. If there are to many requests in a row it is possible that it causes dealocks or transactions cannot be done like in your case

reagards Lothar

entry.title: Re: CDS Abstract Entity and ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model: Input parameter modelling.
entry.content: Nice write up @PrusakouIlya, I was just going to do some proof of concepts and this blog nicely illustrated the options, thanks 🙂

entry.title: New "Wait for API Call" Integrates Processes with External Systems
entry.content:
SAP Build Process Automation has introduced the "Wait for an API Call" step, that pauses a process instance and waits for some system – any system – to call a specific API to resume the process instance. 

NOTE: The step was scheduled to be introduced this week and next to all the SAP BTP landscapes, but there are no guarantees, and the release could be delayed.

 

Why Use It

I believe the idea behind this is a scenario where, from your process, you call an external system that must execute some task before the rest of the process resumes.

For example:

  • A process receives an event from S/4HANA of a new employee/BP.
  • Some approval steps and other steps are executed.
  • Once approved, the process calls a Badge system to create an entry badge for the new person to get into the premises.
  • That Badge system does what it does.
  • When the Badge system is finished, it calls the API connected to the "Wait for an API Call" step, which resumes the process. 

P.S.: This is the idea behind our new SAP Build CodeJam.

 

How It Works

Add "Wait for an API Call" Step

Simply click the + sign to add a step, and go to Controls and Events area.

Then select the Wait for an API Call step.

You then give the trigger a name.

That's all you need to do.

If you want the API call that resumes the process to include additional data, you can define "input" parameters. The UI is the same as when specifying Process Inputs.

 

Call the API 

Once you deploy the process to an environment, a separate trigger is created in that environment for that step -- in the same way an API trigger is created to trigger a new process instance.

Go into your environment, then to the Triggers tab. You'll see a trigger for your wait step.

Select the trigger and click View.

This will show you API details that are slightly different than the API details for the standard process API trigger.

The URL:

  • Standard API Trigger: A fixed URL (for each landscape). For EU10, for example, it is https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances
  • Wait Trigger: The URL path is different and it includes a unique GUID that defines that specific trigger. If you create more than one Wait trigger in a process, they will have different GUIDs. I am not aware of a way to get this GUID at runtime.

The payloads are also different.

  • Standard API Trigger: Contains a definitionId (plus all the process inputs) so the system knows which process you want to trigger.
  • Wait Trigger: Contains an executionId (plus any inputs defined for the Wait trigger) so the system knows which process instance needs to be resumed.

That API can only be used if the specified process instance is actually waiting for that specific API call.

 

Getting the Process Instance ID 

You will need to send the process instance ID to the 3rd-party system that will resume the process instance, so they can include it in the request body of the API.

One way to do this is to create a custom variable to hold the instance ID.

Add Script Task to get the instance ID from the info object and put it in the custom variable.

 

Deleting Wait Triggers

A kind of quirky behavior occurs when you delete a "Wait" trigger and then redeploy – AND you have process instances still running from the previous version of your process.

👉If you delete the "Wait" trigger, what happens to those process instances?

Well, no worries. 

The old processes will continue to run and the old "Wait" trigger can still be used. It will continue to appear in the Control Tower.

When the last process that uses that trigger is completed, that "Wait" trigger will disappear from the Control Tower.

 

Errors

I have not re-created all the potential errors, but so far have figured out when the following status codes are returned when calling the "Wait" API.

  • 204: Success
  • 400: The GUID in the URL does not represent an existing "Wait" trigger.
  • 403: The process instance ID passed in the request body does not exist or that process instance is not waiting for an API call.

This is just based on a few minutes testing, so it may not be 100% accurate. And there may be cases when the API returns other status codes. If you experience any, please let us all know.

entry.title: About Oracle audit settings
entry.content:
We are currently setting up an Oracle audit file.
Please let me know the following.
1. In case of Windows OS, if we set Oracle parameter “audit_trail=os”, is it correct that it will be output to the event log?

 

2. When the Oracle parameter “audit_trail=xml” is set, the output files are stored under the folder set in “audit_file_dest.” Please tell us how to clean up the stored audit files.

 

I have found a way to set parameters in “initSID.sap” by referring to the following SAP Note,
However, “initSID.sap” does not exist under <OracleHome>\database.
Please tell me how to deal with the case where “initSID.sap” does not exist.
1551504 - Oracle audit file cleanup

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: About Oracle audit settings
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

So we are using windows OS, then audit_trail=os, will lead to write audit log to event log.
Also windows, to send audit data to OS files instead of Event Log is to set audit_trail to XML or to  XML,EXTENDED.
And the audit file stores under parameter of audit_file_dest .

To clean up the stored audit logs, you can delete the audit os log directly.
Or use SAP note 1551504, initSID.sap is SAP brtools profile which default locates under:


ORACLE_HOME\Database
or
oracle\sid\sapprof

Please check both locations.

Best regards,
James

entry.title: Re: Success Factors Learning Management
entry.content: “We have created an online item using multi SCORM 1.2 content object which is having separate SCORM content object for separate languages and each language have around 24 videos. Item is working fine and getting completed however the last 1-2 seconds of each video getting skipped. We have used the same videos and created two separate items by splitting the content in two parts and used up to 18 videos in an item and then the videos are getting played without any issue. Hence, we are assuming the issue is not with the content but with the number of videos we are using in an item. Hence, we want to understand the criteria including number of videos, which video format and other details which need to be maintained while content development to avoid any such issues”

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: Just to make sure, is your local instance the only one connected to the database? Or is it a shared database located outside of your local machine? I am asking this because I've seen some strange behaviors on locals using the shared database.

entry.title: Re: How can we create handling unit for inbound deliverie...
entry.content: Thanks Tanja. I know its late but ...:)

entry.title: Re: Problem when calling a method from an include program
entry.content: For sure, it's not related to includes if just this one SELECT statement is concerned, so please forget it (except if you have posted a code different from the actual one). The last possibility is that there's a "DELETE FROM zlistfact" or "UPDATE zlisfact" (changing TABLA) during the report execution (easy to check with the SQL trace).

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: Wrong place to comment 🙂 Updating the conversation below...

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content:
After enabling the same loggers, I've seen the following logs:

DEBUG [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [HybrisAwareThreadPoolExecutor] Preparing thread AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1.
DEBUG [AzureIntegrationUnprocessedFileTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [HybrisAwareThreadPoolExecutor] Preparing thread AzureIntegrationUnprocessedFileTaskExecutorThread-master-1.
DEBUG [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [AzureBlobSession] Listing contents of container [hybris] on path [master/hotfolder].
DEBUG [AzureIntegrationUnprocessedFileTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [HybrisAwareThreadPoolExecutor] Unprepared thread AzureIntegrationUnprocessedFileTaskExecutorThread-master-1.
DEBUG [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [AzureBlobInboundSynchronizer] 0 files transferred from 'master/hotfolder'
DEBUG [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [HybrisAwareThreadPoolExecutor] Unprepared thread AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1.
DEBUG [HotfolderLeaderInitiator-master-1] [LockRegistryLeaderInitiator] Acquiring the lock for LockContext{role=yHotfolderServices, id=master-0, isLeader=true}
DEBUG [HotfolderLeaderInitiator-master-1] [HybrisLockRepository] Acquiring lock for key [7c67706a-d0d1-3e8a-b38e-1693a2906c22] in region [yCloudHotfolders] for node [0].
DEBUG [HotfolderLeaderInitiator-master-1] [HybrisLockRepository] Deleting lock records for key [7c67706a-d0d1-3e8a-b38e-1693a2906c22] in region [yCloudHotfolders] older than [2025-01-23T09:25:34.201+0300].
DEBUG [HotfolderLeaderInitiator-master-1] [HybrisLockRepository] Updating record for lock [lockKey=7c67706a-d0d1-3e8a-b38e-1693a2906c22,region=yCloudHotfolders,clusterId=0,timestamp=Thu Jan 23 09:26:04 TRT 2025].

I think the classes starting with Azure do not print log in your local. There might be some misconfiguration in Spring.

Can you try the file uploaded yesterday to note (https://me.sap.com/notes/0002817992)? File name is cloudhotfolders-2211azuresdk12-SNAPSHOT-202501101831836.zip

entry.title: RAP App with Read-only root entity
entry.content:
Hi,

I had a requirement with 2 custom tables (Parent-Child). I did it fine and it worked... but now they asked to add a new layer to it (G.Parent-Parent-Child)

but here's the trick.... G.Parent is a standard table that we can't touch; It's read-only, and it's only purpose is to make a tie to the previous Parent entity.

Now... they still want to keep the CRUD on Parent and Child... I just need to now allow it on the G.Parent.

I built a custom CDS for the G.Parent, just reading it from the standard and to give it a proper Composition.

 

My problem is how to make the Behavior activate as it does not let me use draft; and remove CRUD from the G.Parent, and considering the G.Parent is in the end a standard table, it does not contain those admin fields:

local_created_by : abp_creation_user;

local_creation_at : abp_creation_tstmpl;

local_last_changed_by : abp_locinst_lastchange_user;

local_last_changed : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

last_changed : abp_lastchange_tstmpl;

 

My behavior is like that right now

 

managed implementation in class ZBP_R_COMPANY unique;

strict ( 1 );

with draft;

define behavior for ZR_COMPANY alias Company

persistent table t880

lock master

authorization master ( instance )

//etag master <field_name>

{

// create;

// update;

// delete;

field ( readonly ) Company;

association _Parent { create; with draft; }

 

draft action Activate optimized;

draft action Discard;

draft action Edit;

draft action Resume;

draft determine action Prepare;

}

 

define behavior for ZR_PARENT alias Parent

persistent table ZPARENT

lock dependent by _Company

authorization dependent by _Company

//etag master <field_name>

{

update;

delete;

field ( readonly ) Uuid;

association _Company;

association _Child { create; }

}

 

define behavior for ZR_Child alias Child

persistent table ZCHILD

//lock dependent by <no_to_master_association found>

//authorization dependent by <no_to_master_association found>

//etag master <field_name>

{

update;

delete;

field ( readonly ) Uuid;

association _Parent;

}

 

Is there a way I can pull this off?

entry.title: Re: FM EAM_TASKLIST_GET_DETAIL to get Task List Data is giving an error

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI

entry.title: DDIC_ACTIVATION TP_STEP_FAILURE 0008
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

System: ECC 6.0

DB: Oracle 11 G

OS: HP Unix

I an Upgrading SAP_Basis Component patch level 17 Release 740. During import we stuck with DDIC_Activation phase first, due to duplicate structure of WLFS_IDOC_LIST_OUT.

So we deleted the duplicate structure of WLFS_IDOC_LIST_OUT, and try to proceed further but again this time we got one more error.

- Error in phase: DDIC_ACTIVATION

- Reason for error: TP_STEP_FAILURE

- Return code: 0008

- Error message: OCS Package SAPK74000ICPSAPBASIS, tp step "A",
return code 0008

we just looking for the solution from the SAP expertise, thanks in Advance whoever looking and providing support on this.

Thanks & Regards,

  Ansar sheikh

entry.title: Re: how change pointers are created in BDCP2 for table AUSP and field classificationchange for ARTMA
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you check the tables and fields defined for the ARTMAS message type in the BD52 transaction code.

entry.title: Re: Triggering POD Plugins from Production Processes using Process Overview plugin within SAP Digita
entry.content:
Hi Manoel, 

Thank you for sharing the detailed information on the POD plugin using via Production process. 

We are following the same and able to open the Data Collection Plugin in the work center POD using production process (PP). 

But we are facing one issue - When we run the PP manually, it opens the popup on the POD perfectly but if we call the same PP from POD itself (on click of action button), then Plugin is not opening in the POD. (Even in the bottom for process Overview - It shows process initiated ) but popup plugin did not opened. Also we can see that in monitor production process, it was waiting for user action. 

I am not sure if we are missing anything here...Can you please suggest ? we wanted to open the DC plugin open automatically from Production process.  (Not direct plugin in POD as it will be conditional capturing the data collection)

Thanks,

Nikhil Gupta

entry.title: Advance Workflow in Incentive Management SF configration
entry.content:
Greetings,
I have a few questions If you could help, it would be appreciated.
- Is Advance workflow only for a closed loop workflow monitoring and processing or does this have other functionalities?
- Can we execute a pipeline of incentive management form a workflow case?
- What are the ways a workflow case can be triggered? do we have to manually create a case each time, or can we trigger it from any other ways e.g(with automation, or when a pipeline is run on Incentive management can that trigger a workflow case for approval of the pipeline)?
- Is there any resource to learn how to connect to IM database using direct db access.

entry.title: Re: Disabling SSH-RSA algorithms to be compliant with SWI...
entry.content: Thanks for the reply Sriram, This note mentions that i need to upgrade my JSch libray to mwiede jsch 0.2.8 version with the PO 7.5 SP28. Our system is currently on 7.5 SP18. Can't we upgrade the JSch library itself instead of upgrading to SP28. I don't want to disturb the entire system for this one particular Adapter.

entry.title: How Enterprises Can Successfully Navigate the Shift from Legacy Systems to Next-Gen Solutions
entry.content:
As organizations scale and markets shift at a high speed, software transformation has become the key requirement of survival and success. Yet, the journey from legacy to next-gen system is rarely straightforward. The question no longer is if transformation is needed, but how to approach it with clarity and purpose. 

"When digital transformation is done right, it’s like a caterpillar turning into a butterfly, but when done wrong, all you have is a really fast caterpillar." This quote from George Westerman resonates deeply in today’s rapidly evolving tech market where 65% of leaders say their transformation efforts lack measurable ROI despite massive investment. 

Well, the reality is that software transformation is far more than upgrading technology or patching pain points. It needs you to reshape how your organization operates and innovates. For a fast-growing enterprise, this isn’t just an IT problem but a serious business challenge where you must manage risks, ensure continuity, and keep your teams aligned on a clear vision. 

Simply put, you’re tasked with modernizing your software stack today while maintaining operational stability, minimizing disruptions, and ensuring long-term value.  

I have observed, that’s where many businesses stumble by taking a reactive, piecemeal approach. Either they cling to outdated systems, patching them with quick fixes, or they leap into complete overhauls that introduce unnecessary complexity and risk. Both of these approaches don’t work in the long run. 

From my experience, I’ve learned that a measured, strategic approach – one that is rooted in understanding gaps, prioritizing outcomes, and focusing on long-term resilience can turn any complex transformation into a streamlined, manageable process.  

In this article, I will talk about a practical approach for simplifying and mastering the software transformation journey. By focusing on intentionality, collaboration, and long-term thinking, you can seize high ROI with legacy modernization without compromising stability or losing sight of your end goals. 

The Need of a Well-Aligned Software Transformation: Why Getting It Right Is Critical Now 

In today’s technology-driven business environment, software is the backbone of how organizations innovate, compete, and deliver value. Therefore, no organization can afford to delay or deal with the repercussions of failed transformation. Now, legacy systems don’t just put you behind your competitors, they leave you vulnerable to disruption from startups, economic shifts, and emerging technologies that are reshaping the market. 

I hope it’s clear that software transformation is imperative, but approaching it right holds a big share. The absence of strategic, well-aligned roadmaps can leave organizations dealing with far more than technological setbacks. Here’s how:  

  1. Disruptions to Operations: The Trap of “Fix First, Think Later” 

One of the biggest risks of an ad-hoc approach to transformation is operational disruption. Jumping into changes without a clear understanding of what’s truly needed or how your systems, teams, and workflows will be impacted can throw business-critical processes into chaos. 

For example, when legacy systems are abruptly replaced without considering how they integrate with existing processes or third-party tools, the result is often downtime, broken workflows, and frustrated teams struggling to restore normalcy. 

That’s when we need to understand that that transformation is not just concerned with software, but it is a transformation of people, processes, and productivity. 

  1. Transformation Without Purpose Leads to Wasted Resources 

Studies shows that 39% of digital transformation projects fail outright, and many more overshoot their budgets without delivering meaningful outcomes. Why? Because too often, organizations focus on replacing systems for the sake of modernization rather than addressing specific gaps or aligning with long-term business goals. 

Remember, when transformation is driven by trends, whether it’s adopting the latest technology trends or rushing to match competitors, it frequently results in wasted investments. Therefore, the key to avoiding this trap is recognizing that transformation isn’t about chasing trends; it’s about driving measurable value. 

  1. Long-Term Stagnation: The Hidden Cost of Misaligned Solutions 

Ironically, the wrong approach to legacy software modernization can leave organizations stuck in the same place they started or worse. Remember, a poorly aligned solutions often fails to scale, adapt, or integrate as business needs adaptability but you are still dealing with another round of fixes. 

For example, a company is replacing its legacy ERP system with a modern platform to address immediate inefficiencies. However, in their rush to modernize, they select a solution that isn’t flexible enough to accommodate their future needs and scalability plans. While the new system works initially, later it becomes a bottleneck as the business expands and requires yet another costly overhaul now.  

Three Proven Strategies for Successful Software Transformation 

Software transformation is just like renovating your home while still living in it, when every decision needs to minimize disruption while creating a better space for the future. The journey can be unstable, especially if you rely on assumptions or rush into changes without a clear map. On the other hand, it can be strategic, collaborative, and rewarding when approached the right way. Here are three core strategies that have made all the difference in my experience: 

  1. Prioritize Collaboration Over Assumption 

The biggest mistake I’ve seen organizations make is assuming they know what’s broken and diving straight into solutions. However, the reality is different. Blindly overhauling a system is like replacing an entire ship when only the sails need fixing. 

That’s why collaboration is critical. Take the time to work with your teams, those who know the systems inside out, bring in external partners to uncover the real pain points. A diagnostic approach helps you see beyond surface-level symptoms to address the root causes of inefficiencies. It is a stage of asking the right questions: What’s still delivering value? What’s holding us back? What do we need to do for moving forward? Because transformations driven by understanding, not assumptions, are always more impactful. 

  1. Go with Phased Evolution, Not Overhaul 

Keep in your mind that throwing out your legacy systems entirely isn’t always the answer. In fact, I’ve found that a full-scale overhaul often leads to unnecessary complexity and downtime. Instead, the most successful transformations focus on evolution. 

This means identifying what’s working in your existing systems and building on it by bridging the gap between legacy and next gen rather than starting from scratch. Emerging technologies like AI, automation, and cloud computing solutions can be layered strategically, where they deliver the most value. This phased, thoughtful approach minimizes disruption and ensures the transformation is both cost-effective and value driven. 

  1. Envision Future-Readiness, Not Just Futureproofing 

A true transformation shouldn’t just solve today’s problems, will also prepare you for the storms of tomorrow. While it’s tempting to focus on immediate challenges, it will solve your business purpose in the long run.  

On the other hand, future-ready solutions aren’t just “modern” for the moment, they’re scalable, adaptable, and resilient. This means building systems that can evolve as your business grows. For that, you need to create an agile mindset within your teams and processes. Organizations that embrace this kind of long-term thinking don’t just survive disruptions; they thrive in them. 

Ready to Seize the Power of a Strategic Transformation?  

We all know that transformations are more than a checkbox on a strategic roadmap. The decisions we make today about how we modernize and evolve our software systems will not only determine how effectively we operate but also how resilient, adaptable, and competitive our organizations remain in the years ahead. 

Therefore, always approach software transformation with a deliberate, thoughtful mindset to ensure every decision aligns with the bigger picture of where your business is headed. Because transformation done right doesn’t just prepare us for the future, it positions us to lead it.  

Now, this is your moment to ensure your organization doesn’t just adapt to change but drives it by turning every complexity into clarity and uncertainty into opportunity.

entry.title: Can we skip interview scheduling process and fill the interview assessment form for candidates
entry.content:
We have a scenario where there are walk-in candidates.

So in this case after the walk-in interview is completed the selected candidates are added to the SuccessFactors system through private external posting.

Is it possible to skip interview scheduling process and fill the interview assessment form for such candidates to avoid another interview notification being sent to candidate as it causes confusion.

entry.title: How to Replace Super Administrator
entry.content:
Dear SAP

I want to add another Super Administrator S-user and then delete the existing Super Administrator S-user.

Is it possible for the new Super Administrator to see the Service Requests and Cases created by S-xxxxxx after S-xxxxxx is deleted? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Replace Super Administrator
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You may first create a new S-user ID for the new super user per KBA 1271482. 

If the existing super user is still working, you may set the newly created S-user as the new super user using the Copy Authorizations feature mentioned in KBA 1614304.

Then the new user will have the same full super user authorizations as the existing super user, which enables the new super user to access all the service requests and cases created by the old super user.

If the old super user S-user ID is not in use any longer, kindly delete the S-ID per KBA 1271482.

Hope the above information helps.

Thanks and regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Performance Form Date Period Suggestion- rename field
entry.content: Hi @awilliams22, I am interested to know how do you manage the performance process for groups with anniversary dates. Do you maintain separate goal plans for anniversary group and calendar year group? What is the goal plan period for the group with anniversary dates?

entry.title: Re: Error "Person Already Hired" While Replicating Employee Master Data From SAP SuccessFa
entry.content:
This is a very nice blog for users who have been using the existing ECC system.

To update ECPAO_EE_KMAP, it is necessary to check the Personuuid, assignment id, employment id, userid, person_id_external, and person_id information from the compound API. Do you have any good ideas on how to download this information in bulk?

Thanks!!

entry.title: Triggered by the Job Request Error
entry.content:
Hi, we’re creating a new job for BulkExportProfilePhotos. We received two job requests: the BulkExportProfilePhotos job has been completed, but there is another job request, 'Triggered by the Job Request,' that has failed.

The error message shows: 'Error occurred. One or more sub-tasks failed. The throwable inside is for the last exception.' What might be the reason for this, and how can it be fixed?

Please refer to the screenshot attached.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP Script SE71
entry.content:
I don't understand why you get all this "FORM TEXT" stuff, which is generated internally and hidden (language-dependent texts) and should not be present in SAPScript windows. Also, I can delete create and delete such useless text without problem.

Solution: check the SAP notes or contact the SAP support.

You may also have a look at the whole code of your SAPscript form by downloading it to a text file via the report RSTXSCRP, and you'll see this "FORM TEXT" section, it should appear once per language above all windows, but in your case, it's also stored in this MICR window (should not be there/should be deleted).

entry.title: Re: Restrict CR types based on Authorization Group in MDG-BP
entry.content:
Hi

The Best solution for this would be to design the roles with the restriction on the Change Request Type. This will be a clean solution without dependency on any enhancement. The Auth Object USMD_CREQ is provided for this purpose.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Vietnam Statutory req: Multiple country COA postings(Reporting) with a single operational COA G/
entry.content: Hello, We meet a similar case now, and also consider to have a Z_table for a substitution rule. But since alternative account is not in COBL structure, how did you deal with CO-OM allocation postings, like assessment between cost centers? Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier ,

Is it possible to add a variable in the topic? Following your example, the country of the address?

This would allow us to create subscriptions in AEM based on the country, as we could have an external system that is only relevant for one country and not interested in the rest of the changes.

By adding this data to the topic, it wouldn't be necessary to open the message to check if it is relevant, and AEM would already distribute the message correctly.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Infopackage, Transformation and DTP for Standard DSO...
entry.content: Thank you Mr.Roland

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Recently we have activated FIORI in our sandbox system, we have activated service in SICF as well. 

When we are testing the service via SICF application is working but when we open the app from launchpad then we are getting Error message as below. Please note same application is working fine in other system.

In devtools there are so many errors I have found

Let me know if any notes need to apply or any configuration missed.

Advance thanks for your help.

Regards,

Nutan

entry.title: Getting Error in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE -> ME/083-Enter Qty Conversion. Just changing the Contr. item
entry.content:
Getting this error while Using bapi to change contract items in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE, full error log below : {
"code": "BAPI/003",
"message": "Instance PurchasingContract of object type 4600000308 could not be changed",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEPO/077",
"message": "Outline agreement still contains faulty items",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEOUT/018",
"message": "No message generated for output of purchasing document",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "warning",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "ME/083",
"message": "Enter Qty Conversion",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION",
"message": "An exception was raised",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},

entry.title: Signing in to SAP Business one with Two Factor Authentication

Dear   All,

Anyone have implemented SAP Business one client with Two Factor Authentication.

Please advise me. Thank you.

Best Regards,

Peearput N.

entry.title: Re: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata nullable action paramet...
entry.content: Hi @AbhishekSharma thanks for your answer. Sorry if I did not ask precisely. The nullable option I want to change is in the metadata document. I attached a screenshot of the part that I want to influence.

entry.title: Re: Customer Ageing Query in Hana for SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello @azacc ,

Can you try this one?

SELECT
    T1."CardCode", 
    T1."CardName", 
    T1."CreditLine", 
    T0."RefDate", 
    T0."Ref1" AS "Document Number",
    CASE
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 13 THEN 'Invoice'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 14 THEN 'Credit Note'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 30 THEN 'Journal'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 24 THEN 'Receipt'
    END AS "Document Type",
    T0."DueDate",
    (T0."Debit" - T0."Credit") AS "Balance",
    
    -- Calculate future balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= -1 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "Future",

    -- Calculate current balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 0 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 30 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "Current",

    -- Calculate 31-60 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 30 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 60 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "31-60 Days",

    -- Calculate 61-90 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 60 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 90 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "61-90 Days",

    -- Calculate 91-120 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 90 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 120 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "91-120 Days",

    -- Calculate 121+ days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 121 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "121+ Days"

FROM 
    "JDT1" T0
INNER JOIN 
    "OCRD" T1 ON T0."ShortName" = T1."CardCode"

 Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content:
Please remove tags other than SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: BAdI impl. ME_PROCESS_PO give an error message but th...
entry.content:
To add custom error message into PO screen:
mmpur_message_forced 'E' '<msgid>' '<msgno>' lv_msgv1 lv_msgv2 lv_msgv3 lv_msgv4.

To stop PO from saving:
 IF sy-ucomm EQ 'MESAVE'.
  "Prompt data incomplete dialog screen with 'Hold' button
  MESSAGE e000(mepo).
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: Part 1: Migrate your Data – Migration Cockpit (SAP S/4HANA 2020 and higher and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I know, LTMC/Migration cockpit can be used only for predefined objects for master data and transactional data. No customization/abap ....

 

BR,

danielaT

entry.title: Onboardees status in position org. chart

Hi, 

I have noticed that onboardees are visible in the org. chart before they are hired. I can also see that this is expected behavior. Ref. 3026712 - Candidates status in Position Org Chart - Onboarding

We do not want the candidates to be visible before they are officially hired. How can I prevent this?

entry.title: Re: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts not having option to add co code and G/L account
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: SmartTable Excel Download Date format issue
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to this - https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/283217d8f187401c8045723abc27e5e0

When using Date EdmType, you should use 'format' property. You could write like this - 

{ property: "Duedate", label: "Due date (islamic)", type: sap.ui.export.EdmType.Date, format: "dd/mm/yyyy" } 

It is working for me. Hope it might solve your issue too.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Fiori apps for Quality Management module
entry.content: Thank you so much for this info! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Geo map enrichment public dimension
entry.content: @William_Yu. I opened an incident for it, and the support colleague confirmed that he could simulate the same issue in their internal SAC system ... let's see what the outcome will be ... FYI, My SAC is version 2025.1.1

entry.title: Re: I need production order cost with all Production issu...
entry.content:
Hi @Deepak33 ,

I don't know if this will work for you or not.

SELECT 
X."BaseRef", 
X."BaseEntry",
(SELECT "ItemCode" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_CODE",
(SELECT "ProdName" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_NAME",
SUM(X."FG_PRICE") AS "FG_PRICE",
SUM(X."RM_PRICE") AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM
(
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "FG_PRICE" ,0  AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM IGN1 T0 
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
UNION ALL
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  0 AS "FG_PRICE",SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "RM_PRICE" 
FROM IGE1 T0 
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
)X
WHERE X."BaseRef"=124020350
GROUP BY X."BaseRef", X."BaseEntry"

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery note printout

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: XSUAA BTP Service Implementation for Custom Python APP
entry.content: Just a minor correction in the blog since we are binding the application with the service we don't need to generate service key as mentioned above. Application bounded will use the credentials from the service. External services need the service key generation.

entry.title: No QM certificate for delivery with mess QC090
entry.content:
Hello,

can anybody assist me during processing Q certificate for delivery. QC21/22 output works fine and show all inspected class characteristics or MIC with upper and lower limits.  Also the message type LQCA in delivery was found cert. profile but throw in cert view:

Message no. QC090

In batch XXX Material XXXX the specification data for characteristic 0010 from certificate profile XXX Certificate type 0003 Version 000001 was not found (master record: Plant XXX Master inspection characteristic 500000X).

with green lights

or if i change from MIC(1) to Classch.(2) in cert. profile: same error..

Classification with mat. specification de/activated in customizing (i have tried both cases) . BmCC show no class. error.

Display modes for insp. ch. in Customizing also defined. Cert. print program is SAP standard.

Thank you in advance! SAP ERP 

Johannes

entry.title: Do we have Purchase Proposals in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Can someone confirm that , we do we have Purchase Proposals in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud or not ?

I have tried to look into the SAP Signavio Process Navigator --> Solution Scenario , but I didn't see any document which refer to it or in the flow diagram it exists in between.

Did anyone has face the same issue in past ? my requirement is I need MRP to propose Purchase Proposals instead of Purchase Request.

Ask me for more clarification if required.

 

Thanks

Ashish

entry.title: Downpayment Clearing in "Create Supplier Invoice" App
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using "Create Supplier Invoice" application to post supplier invoices. For few customers we have made advance payment, during Invoice posting there is no option for Down Payment clearing. But in MIRO (Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced) we can clear the down payment. Most of our users were using "Create Supplier Invoice", Kindly provide a solution to clear down payment in "Create Supplier Invoice" Application.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

Regards,

Ajeesh

entry.title: Re: SE16N - label not visible
entry.content: @DanieleInc  Thankyou for your great help

entry.title: Firebase Integration Issues
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I think there might be an issue with Firebase push notifications.

The mechanism to get the device's Firebase token works fine, and the sending process I’m using (a Python script) also works because the notifications are being delivered.

The problem seems to be with the reporting in the Firebase Console. The data I’m seeing there doesn’t make sense.

For example, here’s my latest send:

  • Total sent: 418
  • Received: 0
  • Impressions: 0
  • Opens: 1

These numbers are inconsistent on multiple levels:

  • At least 4 devices, which I personally checked, received the notification.
  • It’s impossible for 0 devices to have received the notification, yet for 1 to have opened it!

Is anyone else experiencing something like this?

Thanks!

entry.title: The SAP HANA Cloud Videocast is back for Season 2!
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud Videocast Hosts Susen Poppe & Thomas Hammer are ready for season 2!

End of last year, we have been looking for a fun and engaging way to share more insights about different topics in SAP HANA Cloud. After quite some brainstorming, we came up with the idea of a videocast. 

Personally, I am big fan of podcasts, they are easy to consume everywhere at any time. You got some cleaning to do – why don’t you listen to a podcast? Cooking dinner – how about tuning in to your favorite podcast? Walking your dog – learning something new from that podcast you just found? And so on and so forth.  

That why we went live with season 1 of the SAP HANA Cloud Videocast in September 2024. If you have missed season one, definitely take a look at the five episodes we published. The first season mainly focused on the vector engine, which we just released last year. But why don’t you have a look yourself 

Episode 1: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Stefan Bäuerle 

Discover the power of SAP HANA Cloud! In this exclusive interview, Stefan, Head of BTP HANA and Persistency at SAP, and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant, reveal how SAP HANA has revolutionized industries and why SAP HANA Cloud is the key of success for your business. Learn about the incredible benefits of modernizing to the cloud, from cost savings to seamless scalability, and get a sneak peek into SAP’s innovative roadmap. Watch now to take your SAP HANA Cloud journey to the next level! 

Episode 2: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Matt Zenus 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Matt Zenus, the leader of SAP's global Database Product Management and Strategy Team and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Learn more about creating Intelligent Data Applications, the revolutionary SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, and a sneak peek into upcoming innovations. 

Episode 3: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Tobias Mindnich 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Tobias Mindnich, leading the BTP HANA Analytics & Multi Model team and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Tune in for insights on multi-model query processing engines, the innovative SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, and the significant impact of SAP HANA Cloud on analytics. Get ready for some valuable insights! 

Episode 4: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Susen Poppe 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Susen Poppe, SAP HANA Cloud Product Manager and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Learn about the integration, benefits, and advantages, the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine offers for developers in terms of data management and query capabilities. Get insight into how the Vector Engine facilitates the storage and analysis of complex and unstructured vector data for intelligent data applications. 

Episode 5: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Thomas Hammer 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Thomas Hammer, Lead Product Manager for SAP HANA Cloud and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Listen in for insights into various use cases from our esteemed customers. From streamlining operations to Business AI, SAP HANA Cloud’s capabilities are proven by real world customer use cases. Tune in for more details! 

After a few months break, we are now more than excited to be back with season two of the SAP HANA Cloud Videocast! This season we have a bunch of experts joining us introducing many great topics, discussing use cases and letting us know where to get started leveraging some of the great features that are an integral part of SAP HANA Cloud. 

Curious? We will release the first episode on January 28 and will then continue to publish more episodes twice a month, so definitely stay tuned to learn more about native multi-tenancy in SAP HANA Cloud at the end of January. 

In this first episode, my colleague and SAP HANA Cloud expert Rüdiger Karl will be talking about one of the release highlights from our Q4 delivery of SAP HANA Cloud. We will be discussing multi-tenancy in the cloud, internal SAP use cases and resources that will kickstart your journey with native multi-tenancy in SAP HANA Cloud.  

As mentioned, more episodes will follow over the course of the next months and will feature topics like SQL on Files, Knowledge Graph engine, migration and many many more.  

If you do not want to miss any news about SAP HANA Cloud, make sure to follow the whatsnewinsaphanacloud tag in the SAP Community.

entry.title: In SAP Public cloud -At the time of Asset scrap equipment status not changing to "Deleted"
entry.content: In SAP Public Cloud, I am using the serial number profile for Asset procurement and also configured to auto creation of Equipment at the time of Asset GRN but when scrapping the associated Asset then the Equipment status not changing to "Deleted"

entry.content:
Does this approach works only in Dialog mode? Is there any way to convert word document to pdf in back-ground? I would like to do it when it is triggered from from an API. I was able to convert the word document to binary format. From this binary data , I would like to convert it into PDF.

Is there any way to do it?

entry.title: Re: In SAP Public cloud -At the time of Asset scrap equipment status not changing to "Deleted&q
entry.content: Can anyone help me with the possible reason and also please suggest a workaround if this functionality is not available in Public cloud

entry.title: SF - Time Sheet - Recording of Allowances
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

I need your expertise. I have a question regarding time tracking in SuccessFactors. Is it possible to implement a restriction within the time sheet so that only one allowance of a particular allowance type can be recorded per day? I haven't found any way to configure this so far. 

Any hints or suggestions are highly appreciated. 

Thank you & kind regards, 

Alexandra

entry.title: Re: SAC - Translation of public Dimensions
entry.content:
@mtayibi 

Only Descriptions of the dimension member support translation in multiple languages.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/861a276019554b578f2f5161e5eb75ba.html?q=translation#adding-member-descriptions-in-multiple-languages

You can try enabling model translation as discussed below but this will translate property descriptions and not property value descriptions. same goes for Hierarchies.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/16fa42a7ece9468a82a92d13e4dcbd84.html?q=translation#enabling-a-model-for-translation

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Transaction VL10G - quantity of pallets - items with reason for rejection
entry.content:
We use VL10G to book our orders with our hauliers.

However for example when an order consists of 10 pallets but 2 lines have a reason for rejection in the order. And these 2 lines had together 3 pallets, we actually only have 7 pallets to transport. Only 7 pallets will come in the outbound delivery.

Is there any way we can make sure that calculation of pallets in VL10G takes into account the orderlines that have a reason for rejection ?

And maybe also takes into account items that are not available. Currently these items are also in VL10G and will not be available, thus not in the delivery, thus should not be transported.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery not...
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

As per SAP standard configuration in NACE - the delivery note is implemented with the LD00 output type:

The output type is assigned to the V10000 procedure without any requirements:

Thus LD00 can be determined for an outbound delivery even if goods issue is not posted yet.

Of course, your configuration might differ from the SAP standard.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Reverse a Material to dekit the components
entry.content:
Hello @TedJ 

Post the movement type 102 for material A to remove it from the inventory and the movement type 262 for the components to bring them back to inventory. Those postings can be created in MIGO against a production order.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Configuration in S/4HANA for mapping SAC Account type...
entry.content:
@JSEN 

This is what I found I had from SAC planning for S4. ViewThe CDS view displayed is C_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE

I think it should be semantic tags for Assets and Liabilities/Equity and node sign inversion for PL

Nikhil

entry.title: SAC on Signage TV iiyama
entry.content:
Hello i am wondering if there is a possbility to display reports on a TV. 
I see that you can create a link and access but only SAC users can access. Is there a way to make some kind of kiosk mode of a report so that i can easily share this on our TV?

If not, is there any possiblity to generate a URL with my credentials to to auto login and display the report?

What other solutions are possible?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Automation Pilot : Start & Stop HANA Instance, Schedule Executions on Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hi All, can you tell me, if start/stop activity is possible for HANA CLOUD created on other environment?

thanks

-GN

entry.title: Asset Accounting - "No Operating Concern has assigned to Controlling Area" while AFAB for Prev Year
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am encountering an issue while executing the following transactions in the S/4HANA system for the previous fiscal year (2024):

  • Depreciation Run (AFAB)
  • Asset Transfer (ABUMN)
  • Asset Acquisition (F-90)

The system throws the error:
"No Operating Concern has been assigned to the controlling area"

However, the Operating Concern is not activated in the system, not created aswell. This error does not occur in the current fiscal year (2025). Transactions are being posted successfully in the new fiscal year without encountering this issue.

Fiscal Year Details:

  • Fiscal Year: January to December
  • Current Fiscal Year: 2025
  • Previous Fiscal Year: 2024
  • Last Closed Fiscal Year: 2023
  • Balance Carryforward to FY 2025: Completed

Additional Information:

  • This project is Implementation (Realization Phase).
  • 3 Depreciation Areas (attached SS) and 2 Currency Types - 10 - OMR & 30 - OMR 
  • A screenshot of the Legacy Data Transfer status has been attached for reference.

Could you please provide insights into why this error is appearing only for the previous fiscal year?

Your comments and suggestions on this query would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards
Faris

entry.title: Re: Standard Currency Conversion in SAP Analytics Cloud: Portfolio Value Simulation
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to convert by specific Actual year rates using the conversion measure?

For fixed Date option it is required to specify the specific month. 

But in my case I would like to convert by specific year rates which will correspond to the months.

For example :

Jan 2022 by Jan 2024 rates

Feb 2022 by Feb 2024 rates

Mar 2022 by Mar 2024 rates

....

Is there a way to configure that?

Thank you

Yulia

entry.title: Request for Installation Media for NW AS ABAP 7.52 SP13
entry.content:
We have a requirement for the installation of SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP 7.52 SP13 for our customer.

 

However, we are unable to find the media on the SAP Support Portal.

 

Could you kindly assist us by providing the necessary media or download link?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Installation Media for NW AS ABAP 7.52 SP13
entry.content:
The Product Availability Matrix (PAM) provides you with information about SAP software releases: release types, maintenance durations, planned availability, and upgrade paths. The PAM also offers information about platform availability, including database platform and operating systems.
The SAP Software Download Center is the central location to download your company's SAP software.


You can download the SAP products that are associated with your S-user ID. Downloading files requires the Software Download authorization; to request it, contact a user administrator in your company.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...
entry.content: Hi Michael,

entry.title: In S4 what is a need of inbound delivery?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are not using a Warehouse management system. Our system is using SLs for materials management.

My questions is , why do we need an inbound delivery? as we can simply use PO to do a GR.

I want to understand the significance of using an inbound delivery in a process.

entry.title: Re: after create a new banner, the old title in the text...
entry.content: It actually took more than 24 hours. The banner was updated on Tuesday afternoon. This morning at around 8:00 a.m. I checked and the title was updated. Thank you for the replies!

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery not...
entry.content: Hi Dominik, thanks for the quick response, as per SAP Standard we should print the delivery note once the goods issue is completed but as you suggest we can get the delivery note If needed by above approach.

entry.title: Re: India Localization Compliance Reports in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Sahil, COuld you pelase let us know how to add additional columns to the GSTR1 report for Eg Bill to & Ship to Party details.

entry.title: sorter component shows an error message
entry.content: In version 1.131.1, the sorter component shows an error message. The message says that the value of vSorterInfo is not defined. After defining it, an error is displayed on the page.

entry.title: Re: Blank Screen when extending the project using SAP Web...
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems that the Reused Library used by the original SAP Fiori application, cannot be found in the on-premise system where the SAP Fiori application is located. 
I suggest trying to access this link directly in your browser (within internal network), with the direct host of your on-premise system (as defined in the Cloud Connector):
https://<on-premise-system-host>/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/FIN_VEN_LITS/sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js
If you still get a 404 error with a direct access to the system, then I suggest checking that the FIN_VEN_LITS library is installed and activated in your system.
You can also look for the SAP Fiori original application that you are extending here: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/ and make sure that all ite required configurations under section "Implementation Information" -> "Configurations" are done in your on-premise system.

Thanks,

Rotem
